channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Venezuela: International rescue teams join the search for survivors as earthquake deaths surpass 1,400
item.description: More than 2,000 rescue workers from 27 countries have been deployed to Venezuela to locate people trapped under the rubble following the twin earthquakes on Wednesday, in a deployment supported and coordinated by the United Nations.

item.title: The Forgotten Triumph of Rinderpest Eradication, and the Cost of Ignoring Its Lesson
item.description: Animal disease is no longer a distant concern for farmers and veterinarians alone. It is increasingly visible in household budgets: global egg prices surged more than 60% during recent bird flu outbreaks. In South Africa, foot-and-mouth disease pushed beef prices up by 34%. These are not isolated fluctuations in price. They are reminders that when […]

item.title: [UN: June 26] Rescuing Sailors in the Strait of Hormuz, Macky Sall, ‘MUNGA’ Candidate & Lots More
item.description: This Week @UN: UN office leaves Geneva’s Palais Wilson; SecGen-race backroom deals; Pact for the Future’s future. Plus: Shouting match; climate leadership; Costa Rica’s anti-hate steps; Venezuela’s quakes; sailor rescue in Strait of Hormuz paused; carry on, Keir Starmer.  Did someone forward this email to you? Stay sharp & subscribe here! • We encourage you to ... Read more
